app.name: libre
guard.nsec_warning: This text contains what looks like an nsec private key. If published it becomes public forever and your account is compromised. Publish anyway?
profile.title: your profile
profile.intro: Set the display name others see instead of your public key. Stored as a Nostr profile (kind 0) on your relays.
profile.name_hint: shown on your posts, comments and communities
login.import_prompt: Paste your nsec (private key). It is encrypted with your passphrase and stored only in this browser.
login.import_warning:
About to import an existing identity from its key.

• Your key is stored only in THIS browser, encrypted with your passphrase.
• Relays and media servers see your IP address. Use Tor or a VPN if you need to hide it.
• Everything you post is public and permanent; deletion is best-effort.

Continue?
login.nsec_warning: This is your SECRET KEY (nsec). It is the only way to recover this account or log in on another device. Anyone who has it fully controls your account. Never share it. Copy it somewhere safe and private now.
login.backup_prompt: Enter your passphrase to reveal your secret key.
login.unlock_prompt: Enter your passphrase to unlock your identity.
login.set_passphrase: Choose a passphrase to encrypt your key. It cannot be recovered. If you forget it, the identity is lost.
login.passphrase_mismatch: Passphrases did not match. Try again.
login.security_warning:
About to create an anonymous identity.

• Your key is stored only in THIS browser, encrypted with your passphrase.
• Relays and media servers see your IP address. Use Tor or a VPN if you need to hide it.
• Everything you post is public and permanent; deletion is best-effort.

Continue?
community.list.title: communities
community.list.empty: No communities found yet. Create one, or add more relays.
community.create.title: create a community
community.create.intro: Anyone can start a community, no approval needed. You become its founder. Like opening your own board.
community.create.id_hint: Permanent address, used in the URL. Lowercase, no spaces. Cannot be changed later. Choose carefully. e.g. city-politics
community.create.name: name
community.create.name_hint: Display title shown in the list. Any language. You can change it later. e.g. City Politics
community.create.description_hint: One-line intro shown under the name. You can change it later.
community.create.permanent_note: Communities are permanent. There is no delete, not even for you, the creator. That is the point: if the creator is coerced or turns hostile, they still cannot erase the board and silence its members. Content lives on the relays.
community.recent.title: recently visited
community.starred.title: starred
sort.label: Sort
community.deleted_banner: This community's definition was removed, but its posts live on the relays and stay readable here. It cannot be erased.
comment.orphan_note: in reply to a comment your relays haven't received
comment.delete_confirm: Request deletion of this comment? On a decentralized network deletion is best-effort: relays that honor it will drop the comment, but copies may survive elsewhere.
post.delete_confirm: Request deletion of this post? On a decentralized network deletion is best-effort: relays that honor it will drop the post, but copies may survive elsewhere.
post.image_unavailable: image unavailable (could not fetch or decrypt)
media.title: media servers
media.description: Images are encrypted in your browser before upload, so these servers only ever store unreadable data (Blossom protocol, content-addressed by hash so they can be mirrored). One per line.
relays.title: relays
relays.description: libre reads and writes to these relays. Content survives as long as one stays up. Add relays in other jurisdictions for resilience. One per line.
relays.single_warning: Only one relay is configured. That single relay can take you offline, censor your posts, or watch all your activity. Add relays run by different operators.
error.publish_failed: No relay accepted this. Check your relays and try again.
error.load_failed: Could not load from relays. Some may be down.
error.upload_failed: Upload failed. Try another media server or log in.
error.bad_nsec: Not a valid nsec key. Check and try again.
settings.title: settings
settings.description: This device stores your relay list, media servers, favorites, recent communities, locale, and (if you created one) your encrypted local identity key. Nothing here is on any relay.
settings.delete_data_confirm: This permanently deletes everything libre stored on this device, including any local identity key not backed up elsewhere. This cannot be undone. Continue?
about.title: why libre exists
about.body: libre is a community app with no central server to seize, no company to pressure, and no single domain to block. Posts live on Nostr relays run by independent operators around the world. Your identity is a cryptographic key you control. There is no phone number, no real-name check, and nothing for an authority to switch off.
about.law_note: Built in response to laws that put a takedown switch on public speech. There is no switch here to reach.
gate.title: before you connect
gate.body: libre reads and posts through Nostr relays - independent servers run by third parties. When your client connects, each relay can see your IP address, which can reveal your approximate location and network. libre never sends this anywhere itself, but the relays you talk to do observe the connection.
gate.fact_blocked: Until you continue, libre connects to no relay - nothing about you leaves this device.
gate.fact_ip: When you continue, your client starts reading from relays and each one sees your IP address.
gate.fact_saved: Your choice is saved on this device, so you won't be asked here again.
gate.tip: To hide your IP, connect through Tor or a trusted VPN before continuing. You can change or remove relays any time from the Relays page.
list.load_failed: Couldn't load more. Tap to retry.
